text.title: Fork vs Fix Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the 5-axis decision rule to one upstream-library bug.

step.name: score-axes
step.input: Bug summary + repro + library health snapshot
step.action: Score each axis 0-3 with explicit evidence: URGENCY, BLAST, PATCH-SIZE, UPSTREAM-RESPONSIVENESS, STRATEGIC-DEPENDENCY.
step.decision-gate: If evidence text is empty for any axis, FAIL — re-score with concrete data.

step.name: compute-action
step.action: Map 0-3 → WORKAROUND, 4-6 → MONKEY-PATCH, 7-9 → UPSTREAM-PR, 10-12 → FORK-PIN, 13-15 → REPLACE per r2.

step.name: apply-overrides
step.input: Initial action + strategic_dependency score + library identity
step.action: Strategic override (r3): if strategic_dependency == 3, action must be ≥ UPSTREAM-PR. Ban list (r5): if library is in {auth, crypto, framework-core}, MONKEY-PATCH forbidden — escalate.

step.name: write-decision-record
step.action: Produce ADR + FixDecision JSON. Include `rollback_plan` (mandatory) and, for FORK-PIN, `sunset_criterion` per r4.

step.name: schedule-sunset-or-followup
step.action: For FORK-PIN: open Renovate config to track upstream + calendar a re-rebase review monthly. For WORKAROUND: open follow-up ticket with 90-day review date. For UPSTREAM-PR: open PR with tests + cross-reference the FixDecision.
step.decision-gate: If FORK-PIN without sunset_criterion or schedule, FAIL the review.
